name: Ayushi Sharma
role: Partnerships Lead, Global Shapers DC Hub
bio: Ayushi is a civic leader and partnerships strategist focused on policy, health equity, and community organizing across Washington, DC.

name: Jordan Lee
bio: Jordan works at the intersection of climate policy and economic development, advising on federal infrastructure strategy.

name: Priya Nair
bio: Priya is a first-generation college student and aspiring social entrepreneur with experience in microfinance across South Asia.

name: Marcus Webb
bio: Marcus builds data infrastructure for public sector clients, with a focus on transparency and civic tech.

name: Sofia Delgado
bio: Sofia's research centers on maternal health disparities in urban communities, with published work in JAMA Network Open.

name: Tariq Hassan
role: Foreign Service Officer, U.S. Department of State
bio: Tariq has served in three countries across Sub-Saharan Africa, specializing in economic diplomacy and trade policy.
